entries.description: In exportmatching.tsx, I fixed type errors on lines 90 and 139. For line 90, I added explicit type annotations `[string, number]` to the destructured parameters in both the `.filter()` and `.map()` callbacks to resolve an issue where `quantity` was being inferred as `unknown`, preventing the use of the `>` operator. For line 139, I typed the `sum` and `qty` parameters in the `.reduce()` callback as `number` to fix an error where the `+` operator was being applied to `unknown` types.

In pendingorder.tsx, I resolved a type error on line 1117 within the `loadStockData` function. The `item` parameter in the `.reduce()` callback was being inferred as `unknown`. To fix this, I added explicit types for both the accumulator (`acc: Record<string, number>`) and the initial value (`{} as Record<string, number>`), ensuring `item` is correctly typed as `StockItem` and preventing property access errors.
